caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is centered against a plain, dark background, appearing to speak directly to the camera. She wears a light green, long-sleeved top adorned with small red and blue floral embroidery around the neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small black lapel microphone is clipped to her shirt. In the bottom-left corner of each scene, a small circular logo contains the text "NPTEL". Across the sequence, her facial expressions shift slightly as she speaks; her mouth opens and closes and her gaze remains focused forward. Her posture remains still and centered throughout the clip, with no other people, objects, or movements present in the scene.
